name: talamus-memory
description: Consent-aware, local-first project memory with cited retrieval and provenance.

interface.shortDescription: Cited local memory for agent projects
interface.longDescription: Use Talamus through a consent-aware CLI workflow to search and recall local project notes, inspect provenance, history, graph links, and brain health. The plugin installs no package, MCP server, hook, or capture process.
defaultPrompt: Find a project decision in Talamus and cite the notes behind it.
Show how a decision changed over time in this Talamus brain.
Check this Talamus brain's health and suggest the safest next step.
